zh.lifeSummary: Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria是Khan Ivan Sratsimir Shishman of Bulgaria和Princess Keratsa Petritsa Sishman of Vidin的兒子，於大約1298年出生在保加利亞Велико Търново維利可 騰諾沃。他於從1345年到1349年與Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia在保加利亞結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1371年2月17日享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria是Khan Ivan Sratsimir Shishman of Bulgaria和Princess Keratsa Petritsa Sishman of Vidin的儿子，于大约1298年出生在保加利亚Велико Търново維利可 騰諾沃。他于从1345年到1349年与Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia在保加利亚结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1371年2月17日享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ivan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

nameMeanings.name: Aleksandar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria was born about 1298, in Veliko Turnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgaria as the son of Khan Ivan Sratsimir Shishman of Bulgaria and Princess Keratsa Petritsa Sishman of Vidin. He married Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia from 1345 to 1349, in Bulgaria. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 17 February 1371, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria est né environ 1298, à Veliko Turnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgarie, fils de Khan Ivan Sratsimir Shishman of Bulgaria et Princess Keratsa Petritsa Sishman of Vidin. Il a épousé Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia du 1345 au 1349, à Bulgarie. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 17 février 1371, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria wurde um 1298 in Veliko Turnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgarien, als Sohn von Khan Ivan Sratsimir Shishman of Bulgaria und Princess Keratsa Petritsa Sishman of Vidin geboren. Er hat von 1345 bis 1349 in Bulgarien Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Februar 1371 im Alter von 74 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria è nato il circa 1298 nel Veliko Turnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgaria come figlio di Khan Ivan Sratsimir Shishman of Bulgaria e Princess Keratsa Petritsa Sishman of Vidin. Lui sposato Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia da 1345 a 1349, nel Bulgaria. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 17 febbraio 1371, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgariaは約1298年にブルガリアВелико Търновоベリコ ターノボでKhan Ivan Sratsimir Shishman of BulgariaとPrincess Keratsa Petritsa Sishman of Vidinの息子として生まれた。から1345年まで1349年にブルガリアでSarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachiaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1371年2月17日に74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria(은)는 대략 1298년 불가리아 Велико Търново 벨리코 터른보에서 Khan Ivan Sratsimir Shishman of Bulgaria(와)과 Princess Keratsa Petritsa Sishman of Vidin의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1345년 부터 1349년 까지 불가리아에서 Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1371년 2월 17일 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria nasceu aproximadamente 1298, em Veliko Turnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgária filho de Khan Ivan Sratsimir Shishman of Bulgaria e Princess Keratsa Petritsa Sishman of Vidin. Ele casou-se com Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia de 1345 a 1349, em Bulgária. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de fevereiro de 1371, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria родился около 1298 г. в местности велико турново, Велико Търново, Болгария. Его родителей звали Khan Ivan Sratsimir Shishman of Bulgaria и Princess Keratsa Petritsa Sishman of Vidin. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia с 1345 по 1349 в местности Болгария. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 17 февраля 1371 г. в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria nació aproximadamente 1298, en Veliko Turnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgaria como hijo de Khan Ivan Sratsimir Shishman of Bulgaria y Princess Keratsa Petritsa Sishman of Vidin. Se casó con Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia desde 1345 hasta 1349, en Bulgaria. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 17 de febrero de 1371, a la edad de 74 años.
